channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: China‑built spy satellite allegedly used by Iran to monitor US military bases in Middle East
item.description: A report by the Financial Times, cited in this article, claims that Iran used a Chinese‑built military‑grade spy satellite called TEE‑01B to monitor key US military bases across the Middle East during...

item.title: Subcontinent likely to face mild monsoon due to expected El Niño this year
item.description: Karachi-based weather authorities have warned that the subcontinent might experience a milder monsoon this year due to the possible formation of a ‘super El Niño’. According to Pakistan Meteorological...

item.title: Police constable killed as gunmen open fire on polio team security in Dera Murad Jamali, Balochistan
item.description: A police constable was martyred on Wednesday when unidentified armed men opened fire on a security party escorting a polio vaccination team in Dera Murad Jamali, Nasirabad district of Balochistan. The...

item.title: Julius Malema faces sentencing as EFF supporters rally outside KuGompo City Magistrate’s Court
item.description: EFF leader Julius Malema appeared in the KuGompo City Magistrate’s Court on Wednesday, 15 April 2026 for sentencing after being found guilty in October 2025 on charges related to the discharge of a fi...

item.title: Readers Share Humorous and Thoughtful Observations on Everyday Life
item.description: The article is a compilation of quirky and thoughtful contributions from readers to the Sydney Morning Herald's Column 8. Among the submissions, Chris Commens from Rosebery suggests that households co...

item.title: Iran warns U.S. blockade enforcement could breach cease‑fire terms
item.description: Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy has warned that any ongoing U.S. military blockade around Iranian ports and the Strait of Hormuz would be treated as a violation of the fragile cease‑fire...

item.title: Retirees face long delays accessing deceased spouses’ super while reforms stall
item.description: The article reports on the experience of 75‑year‑old retiree Irene Thomas, who spent more than six months dealing with industry super fund Cbus to access her late husband Geoff’s remaining superannuat...

item.title: Samrat Choudhary Sworn in as Bihar’s First BJP Chief Minister
item.description: Samrat Choudhary on Wednesday assumed office as the Chief Minister of Bihar, making history as the first leader from the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) to hold this position in the state. His appointmen...

item.title: Undercover BBC probe expose illegal advisers helping migrants fake gay identity to get asylum
item.description: A BBC undercover investigation don show say some UK‑based legal advisers and law firms dey charge migrants thousands of pounds so say to help them fake as gay persons so sey they fit claim asylum insi...

item.title: Debate Grows Over Southern Borno Senatorial Seat Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Di matter for who go represent Southern Borno for Senate don dey hot as we dey approach di 2027 elections. Political stakeholders don split on whether make dem replace di current senator, Ali Ndume. D...

item.title: Malacañang says Sara Duterte’s absence from impeachment hearings was her personal decision
item.description: Malacañang clarified on Wednesday, April 15, 2026, that Vice President Sara Duterte’s decision not to attend the House justice panel’s impeachment hearings was entirely her choice. Palace Press Office...

item.title: Trump criticises UK immigration and energy policies in Sky News interview
item.description: In a recent Sky News interview, US President Donald Trump sharply criticised the United Kingdom’s immigration and energy policies, saying the country has ‘bad immigration policies and bad energy polic...

item.title: Coach Philip Onyango Shares His Role in Mentoring WNBA Draftee Madina Okot
item.description: Veteran Kenyan basketball coach Philip Onyango recently shared insights on his mentorship of Madina Okot, a young talent who has now been drafted into the WNBA. Onyango, who has decades of coaching ex...

item.title: How US–Tanzania Trade Evolved from Historical Routes to a Strategic Resource Partnership
item.description: This article by Ben Kazora looks at the long journey of relations between the United States and Tanzania, tracing it from the early 19th century trading period to the modern day of global supply chain...

item.title: Two Arrested Over Abduction and Murder of 9-Year-Old in Kiambu
item.description: In Kiambu County, the Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) has arrested two men, James Ngigi Ngendo, 32, and James Mburi Chichu, 75, over the abduction and murder of a 9-year-old boy named Leo...

item.title: Joan Crawford’s Lost 1932 Film 'Letty Lynton' to Be Legally Screened After 90 Years
item.description: Joan Crawford, one of Hollywood’s most iconic stars, has a film from 1932, 'Letty Lynton', that hasn’t been legally screened since January 1936. The drama, based on Marie Belloc Lowndes’ novel and ins...

item.title: Former President Pratibha Patil Supports Women's Reservation Bill, Calls It a Key Step for Gender Equality
item.description: Former President Pratibha Devisingh Patil has conveyed her strong backing for the Nari Shakti Vandan Adhiniyam, commonly referred to as the women's reservation bill, in a letter to Prime Minister Nare...

item.title: Plateau Health Workers Warned About Kidnapping Threat from Armed Groups
item.description: People dey fear for Plateau State as the Plateau State Specialist Hospital don alert their staff say armed gangs dey plan to kidnap healthcare workers. The memo, wey dem send to all heads of departmen...

item.title: LENTE to join DAP panel discussion on party-list representation reforms
item.description: The Legal Network for Truthful Elections (LENTE) announced that its Senior Program Director, Atty. Ryan Jay Roset, will take part in the CBILLS Thursday Talks #1 on Party-List Representation, which is...

item.title: Jason Bateman and Linda Cardellini Submitted for Supporting Emmys for HBO Max Series 'DTF St. Louis'
item.description: Jason Bateman and Linda Cardellini are seeking Emmy consideration for their roles in HBO Max's limited series 'DTF St. Louis.' Bateman, portraying local weatherman Clark Forrest, has been submitted fo...
